gigapan.description:
Today was a day for exploration, and adventure.  I took random subway trains, and explored new areas.  And I didn't take the massive mast.

But when I got here I had to have a shot of the details - the names of rivers pressed into the building, the hammocks, the snow.

So I held the gigapan on a trash can and did my best to cover the lens with my handto protect it from the snow.
